response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned full-stack engineer with broad polyglot experience (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, some C/C++), but the role specifically requires a C++ developer with 8-12 years of hands-on C++, STL, multi-threading, message brokers, MQTT, and IEC 62443 industrial cybersecurity expertise. C++ exposure is limited to a brief 7-month stint at National Instruments (2014-2015) and an undergraduate thesis. No evidence of industrial automation, secure development lifecycle, IEC 62443, or relevant protocols (Modbus, OPC UA, etc.). Recent career trajectory is web/cloud/AI tooling, not systems/embedded C++.
strengths: Long tenure (~13+ years) with diverse engineering experience across web, embedded, and distributed systems
Some C/C++ exposure at National Instruments on LabWindows/CVI plus a C++ wave-field-synthesis thesis
Strong testing/TDD culture, mentoring, workshops, and agile collaboration track record
concerns: C++ experience is minimal (~7 months, ~10 years ago) — far below the role's senior C++ bar
No demonstrated experience with IEC 62443, Secure Development Lifecycle, or industrial cybersecurity standards
No exposure to industrial automation protocols (Modbus, OPC UA, MQTT, IEC 61850/104, DNP 3.0) or message-broker-based large-scale C++ systems

key_factors.factor: No industrial automation or relevant protocol experience
